subcodes.first_line: O ye seekers of Truth! Your letter was received and its contents became known. The new Kingdom hath raised its tents in all regions
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو طالب ملکوت مکتوب رسید و مطلب مفهوم گردید ملکوت جدید خیمه بر آفاق زده و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @call to action, @love and unity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity
